title: lysimachia lydgatei
intro: Lysimachia lydgatei, also known as Ma'o, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Lysimachia lydgatei is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and has also been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal and spiritual properties.
